PostToolUse.command: for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$file" in *.ts) if rg -n "BehaviorSubject|ReplaySubject|Subject<" "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "DA-Bubble guardrail: observable state container detected in $file. Prefer signals or Signal Store."; fi ;; esac; done

for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$file" in *.ts|*.html) if rg -n "ngx-translate|TranslateService|translate\|" "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "DA-Bubble guardrail: possible second i18n system detected in $file. Use the existing I18nService unless migration was requested."; fi ;; esac; done

for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$file" in *firestore.rules|*storage.rules|*functions/src/*) echo "DA-Bubble guardrail: Firebase-sensitive file changed: $file. Review rules, contracts, and auth assumptions together." ;; esac; done

for file in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$file" in *features/dashboard/*|*shared/dashboard-components/*|*.scss) echo "DA-Bubble reminder: dashboard or styling change detected in $file. Check desktop, tablet, mobile, and PWA behavior." ;; esac; done
